login.title: Sign in to your console
login.subtitle: Use your admin credentials to access the dashboard.
login.needAccess: Need access? Contact your organization's superuser to be invited as an admin.
login.footer: © {{year}} OrionAI — Built for distributed AI operations.

hero.headline: Telemetry from every deployment, in one place.
hero.subheadline: Securely ingest, aggregate, and visualize usage signals across every OrionAI chatbot deployed in the wild.

realtime.title: Real-time aggregates
realtime.body: Daily usage, tokens, and document signals refreshed continuously.

encrypted.title: Encrypted ingestion
encrypted.body: HMAC-signed payloads with PII encrypted at rest using Fernet.

idempotent.title: Idempotent batching
idempotent.body: Deterministic dedupe ensures retries never produce duplicate data.

errors.missingCredentials: Please enter your email and password.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for doesn't exist, or you may not have permission to view it. Let's get you back to safety.
